title: Carpet Buzzies
description: A Carpet Mod extension that allows you to manipulate the generation of bee nests on newly grown trees.
body:
# Carpet Buzzies
_Carpet Buzzies_ is an extension for Carpet Mod ([fabric-carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)), that currently has only two settings, both of which are related to the manipulation of the generation of bee nests on newly grown trees.

The first of these two settings is `beeNestGeneration`, which controls how often or whether at all bee nests generate on newly grown trees. While this setting can significantly increase the chance of a bee nest generating on a tree, it should never place a bee nest where it wouldn't occur on a tree in vanilla. This makes it useful for testing tree farms, specifically, mangrove tree farms, as those have bee nests that cannot be prevented from growing, and it's useful to know whether a nest can generate in a spot that would break the farm.

The second is `beeNestsGenerateBees`, which simply controls whether or not new bee nests will generate with bees inside. It's good if you're testing a tree farm and don't want bees to randomly come out while you're testing.
